headline: The Atlantic created a searchable database of the music used to train AI
summary: The Atlantic compiled a searchable database of music used for AI training. Reporter Alex Reisner uncovered four significant datasets. Two datasets alone contain 12 million and 9 million tracks.

headline: Musician and YouTuber Hainbach on ‘Breath of the Wild’ and Swiss Army Knives
summary: Experimental musician Hainbach creates music using laboratory equipment. He likens his unique synthesis style to the "Dark Souls of synthesis." Hainbach is known for his unconventional, "hard mode" production techniques.

headline: Moves of the Diamond Hand is an unfinished, irresistibly weird dice-based RPG
summary: "Moves of the Diamond Hand" is described as a creative, unfinished RPG. The game features numerous strange conversations and extensive dice rolling. It offers a unique and highly praised roleplaying experience.

headline: Toy Story has the right take on tech
summary: The article explores "Toy Story's" perspective on technology. This piece is part of the Installer newsletter's 133rd edition. The author also mentions reading about Sam Bankman-Fried.

headline: Stranger Than Heaven Second-Take Preview: Stranger Than Heaven’s Combat Seems Harder Than Hell, and that’s a Good Thing
summary: "Stranger Than Heaven" features a challenging and flexible fighting system. Its combat offers an increased difficulty compared to standard "Like a Dragon" brawling. RGG Studio aims to deliver fresh gameplay in this new series prequel.

headline: X-Men Star Famke Janssen Thinks Marvel 'Made a Mistake' By Not Bringing Her Jean Grey Back for Avengers: Doomsday
summary: Famke Janssen believes Marvel Studios made an error. She was not invited to reprise her role as Jean Grey. Janssen feels she should have returned for "Avengers: Doomsday."

headline: Epic Games Store Roadmap Promises 5x Faster Boot Times, User Reviews, and More
summary: Epic Games Store unveils a new roadmap of upcoming features. Promised updates include 5x faster boot times and user reviews. The platform is also slated for a significant launcher redesign.

headline: The GTPLAYER Big and Tall Gaming Chair Drops to Less Than $160 Ahead of Amazon Prime Day
summary: The GTPLAYER Big and Tall Gaming Chair is now under $160. This deal is available in anticipation of Amazon Prime Day. It's suggested as a great gift, even with potential delayed delivery.

headline: US-Iran talks to begin in Switzerland as Tehran says it closed Strait of Hormuz
summary: US-Iran talks are set to commence in Switzerland. Tehran claims to have closed the Strait of Hormuz. The US disputes this closure, which Iran links to Israeli attacks in Lebanon.

headline: Nine people in critical condition among 100 injured in fatal Bedford train crash
summary: A fatal train crash in Bedford resulted in 100 injuries. Nine individuals are currently in critical condition. British Transport Police are investigating the incident, which killed a train driver.

headline: Talk of Starmer staying on to fight is fading - fast
summary: Support for the current Prime Minister is rapidly declining. This shift follows Andy Burnham's recent by-election victory. Laura Kuenssberg reports that the idea of Starmer remaining is quickly fading.

headline: King Charles to reveal personal tax bill for first time as monarch
summary: King Charles will publicly disclose his personal tax bill. This marks an unprecedented move for a reigning British monarch. The information will be included in the annual royal financial report.
